name: Sentinel (Alibaba)
description: Flow control, circuit breaking and system protection library by Alibaba for Java microservices.

seo.title: Sentinel (Alibaba) — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Sentinel (Alibaba): Flow control, circuit breaking and system protection library by Alibaba for Java microservices.

when_to_use: Flow control and rate limiting for Java microservices
Circuit breaker for resilient Alibaba-stack services
System protection from traffic spike for Spring Cloud
Adaptive throttling for downstream service protection
Bulkhead isolation for microservice fault tolerance

review.verdict: Battle-tested resilience library for Java microservices, though Resilience4j is often the easier Western default.
review.best_for: Java teams needing Alibaba-scale flow control libraries
review.not_for: Polyglot stacks or teams preferring Resilience4j
